original_question: Which Colorectal trials had at least 4 arms and used Chemo/Anti-EGFR+Radiotherapy as control?

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab, Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

model_raw_sql_output: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Cancer type", "Trial phase", "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Mesothelioma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND CAST("Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" AS REAL) > 21

original_question: Show Bladder trials using PD1, CTLA-4 where PD‑L1 positivity was an inclusion criterion.
new_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD1, CTLA-4' AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';
generated_question: What clinical trials investigated PD1 or CTLA-4 inhibitors for renal cell cancer that did not require PD-L1 positivity for inclusion?
pred_sql:
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Cancer type",
  "Name of ICI"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" = 'Renal Cell Carcinoma' AND (
    "Name of ICI" = 'PD-1' OR "Name of ICI" = 'CTLA-4'
  ) AND "Is PD-L1 positivity inclusion criteria" = 'No';
model_raw_sql_output:
```sql
SELECT
  "NCT",
  "Author",
  "Year",
  "Trial phase",
  "Cancer type",
  "Name of ICI"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE
  "Cancer type" = 'Renal Cell Carcinoma' AND (
    "Name of ICI" = 'PD-1' OR "Name of ICI" = 'CTLA-4'

```

original_question: Show Prostate studies included in the meta‑analysis that used PD1, CTLA-4 agents.
